designSystem.style: Warm, gamified productivity app with an orange-indigo accent palette. Card-based layout with bold typography, metric bars, and simulation progress animations. Light mode uses a warm cream base (#FDF4EC) with crisp white cards. Dark mode uses deep navy-black (#0C0C18) with elevated surface cards. Micro-interactions on route selection and toggle events.

screens: Home — greeting, streak + savings banner, today's best route card, weekly bar chart, active disruptions
Simulate — route option cards with stress/reliability bars, life event chips, animated progress simulation, result score display
Events — 2-column grid of toggleable life event cards (rain, delays, school pickup, sick kid, etc.) with impact badges
Insights — 2x2 stat grid (time/money/stress/CO2), route performance bars, expandable smart recommendation cards
Settings — profile card, routine addresses, dark mode toggle, notification and priority preferences
